flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Rhode Island School of Design fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (69.5% → 48.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rhode Island School of Design rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.3k → $62.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rhode Island School of Design rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.3k → $62.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rhode Island School of Design fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
